title: Solvane & Sons - Play Piano In Minecraft
description: Minecraft Forge mod that adds realistic grand piano in game with advanced features.
body:
**Grand Piano Mod adds playable grand pianos to Minecraft. Place a piano, sit at the bench, and play using your computer keyboard with 88-key support, or use built-in songs and your own recordings.**

**THIS IS A BETA VERSION SO YOU MAY EXPERIENCE BUGS**


**Features**

**Pianos** — Place grand pianos in the world. Choose from Baby Grand (61 keys), Medium Grand (76 keys), Full Grand (88 keys), Concert Grand (88 keys), or Upright Piano (88 keys).

**Play** — Interactive keyboard: play notes right from your keyboard, optional velocity sensitivity, and note particles. Sound supports reverb and configurable polyphony.

**Customize** — Many finishes (Black, White, Mahogany, Walnut, Cherry, Ebony, Rosewood, Oak, Maple, Ivory, and colors like Royal Blue, Emerald, Crimson, Gold, Silver, Pearl, Midnight Purple, Ocean Teal, Sunset Orange) plus a custom color option. Optional custom piano names.

**Record & share** — Record performances and save them to Sheet Music items. Use Blank Sheet Music to create new scores. Configurable max recording length.

**Tools** — Metronome (configurable BPM), Tuning Fork, and crafting items Piano Hammer and Piano String.
Multiplayer — Optional sync so other players hear what you play in real time.

**Config** — Tune sound range, master volume, reverb, particles, recording limits, pianos per chunk, and more via grandpianomod-common.toml.


**Requirements — Minecraft 1.20.1, Forge 47+.**
